rulings.Case Title: KARLY KAPLAN VS. DOVIMA TOM et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF CONTRACT (NO CONTRACT STATED AS TO ANGELA WU). DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION OVERRULED. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE. DEMURRER TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. NO NEGLIGENCE SPECIFIC AS TO WU. DEMURRER TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE. NO FRAUD ALLEGED AS TO WU. DEMURRER TO 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE. DEMURRER TO 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION WRONGFUL EVICTION OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE. 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICE OVERRULED. 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION DECLARATORY RELIEF SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. (302/AJR/KS(EX))

rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES DENIED AS TO WRONGFUL EVICTION OTHERWISE MOOT. (302/AJR/KS(EX))
